sites.name: Publishers Clearing House (PCH)
sites.prizes: $1M cash + Cadillac Escalade (major current); many cash, cars, vacations
sites.draw: Variable by promotion; major winners often in-person Prize Patrol
sites.unsub: Email footer unsubscribe link or contact PCH support
sites.redFlags: Heavy impersonator scams (phone/texts asking for fees to claim). Real PCH never asks for money.
sites.affiliate_note: Check FlexOffers / Impact for PCH campaigns

sites.name: Swagbucks
sites.prizes: Ongoing raffles for cash/gift cards (hundreds of millions paid historically)
sites.draw: Ongoing raffles + daily earning opportunities via tasks
sites.unsub: Account settings → Notifications, or email unsubscribe links
sites.redFlags: Time-intensive for modest earnings; survey disqualifications common
sites.affiliate_note: Prodege / Impact / FlexOffers – typically $1–$3+ per verified signup

sites.name: InboxDollars
sites.prizes: Cash & gift cards via activities + occasional sweepstakes/raffles
sites.draw: Ongoing tasks + variable raffles
sites.unsub: Account settings or email footer unsubscribe
sites.redFlags: Modest payouts relative to time invested
sites.affiliate_note: Impact / MaxBounty / Prodege – CPA around $2–$3 + residual %

sites.name: Mondosweeps
sites.prizes: $1,548,705 lump sum; $500k Dream Home; $300k/$125k cash; $88k Dream Car; $25 Daily Cash (guaranteed one winner/day); $100 cash; $750/$1k GCs
sites.draw: Daily drawings (entries by midnight ET; winners notified next day)
sites.unsub: Email footer unsubscribe link or account preferences
sites.redFlags: Aggressive daily marketing emails; big jackpots still long shots
sites.affiliate_note: Check if they have partner program (often network-driven)

sites.name: Winstakes
sites.prizes: Up to ~$1,542,625 lump sum cash; $25 Daily Cash; $50, $100, $750, $1,000 cash examples
sites.draw: Daily ($25 Daily Cash guaranteed); some weekly
sites.unsub: Email footer or dedicated unsubscribe page
sites.redFlags: Similar spam volume to Mondosweeps
sites.affiliate_note: Similar to Mondosweeps – look for network offers

sites.name: Prizegrab
sites.prizes: $10k cash examples; $300 Shell GC; $25 Dunkin' GC; other gift cards & merchandise
sites.draw: Daily winners guaranteed; ongoing promotions
sites.redFlags: Data selling / spam calls after signup common complaint
sites.affiliate_note: Search affiliate networks for Prizegrab offers

sites.name: Prizeloot
sites.prizes: $499,999 cash; $77,777.77; $3,333 cash (multiple recent named winners); $200/$100/$20 Daily Cash; iPad, 50" TV, drone, Stanley tumbler
sites.draw: Daily entries & daily drawings/awards (resets midnight ET)
sites.redFlags: Globalizer-style marketing volume; inconsistent big prize independent proof
sites.affiliate_note: Globalizer network – often have CPA offers

sites.name: Million Dollar Media
sites.prizes: Brand-partnered cash, cars, merchandise (real user reports e.g. SodaStream)
sites.draw: Varies by partnered campaign
sites.redFlags: Depends entirely on the partner brand; some campaigns feel sales-driven
sites.affiliate_note: Contact for brand campaign partnerships

sites.name: RetireWhiz
sites.prizes: $250 cash; $5M Retirement Sweepstakes; $33k giveaway; ~$125k motorhome
sites.draw: Daily or periodic (check specific rules for end dates)
sites.redFlags: Retirement-niche marketing emails can be persistent
sites.affiliate_note: Content site – check for partner links

sites.name: PINCHme (Free Samples)
sites.prizes: Free product samples / full-size items (build box of 4 via quizzes + coins for free shipping)
sites.draw: Ongoing daily samples; qualification-based (not pure chance)
sites.redFlags: Low-quality samples for many users; qualification frustration; site glitches reported
sites.affiliate_note: Influencer / referral style – check their partner page

sites.name: PrizeCraze (Globalizer)
sites.prizes: $25 Daily Cash (guaranteed one winner/day); bigger cash jackpots; Craze Coins for extra entries
sites.draw: Daily drawings; one $25 guaranteed daily
sites.redFlags: Network marketing volume; typical Globalizer spam
sites.affiliate_note: Globalizer network CPA

sites.name: BlissXO
sites.prizes: $125k instant win; $80k+ in cash prizes; free samples & deals focus
sites.draw: Instant win + periodic drawings
sites.redFlags: Spam association noted; freebie marketing intensity
sites.affiliate_note: Check for partner/affiliate page

sites.name: Winloot (Globalizer)
sites.prizes: $5M / $1M / $100k+ cash; $250 Daily Cash (guaranteed); $5k instant wins; many small cash/GCs/electronics
sites.draw: Daily + instant wins (multiple entries/day possible)
sites.redFlags: Highest complaint volume in network (non-payment claims + spam); mixed fulfillment reports
sites.affiliate_note: Globalizer – strong CPA potential

sites.name: Daily Goodie Box
sites.prizes: Free samples / full-size products in 'goodie boxes' (not guaranteed; based on brand campaigns & availability)
sites.draw: Ongoing campaigns; receipt not guaranteed
sites.unsub: Contact admin@dailygoodiebox.com or cancel account via site
sites.redFlags: Many users report never receiving anything; impersonator messages; some similar 'box' reports of unexpected charges
sites.affiliate_note: Avoid promoting heavily – high risk

sites.name: SelectRewards
sites.prizes: Promised big gift cards (e.g. $750) via quizzes — user reports often low/no payout
sites.draw: Funnel / quiz-based
sites.redFlags: Deceptive marketing; frequent reports of little to no real payout
sites.affiliate_note: Do not promote

sites.name: Sweepstakes Advantage
sites.prizes: Directory covering cash, trips, vehicles, gift cards, instant wins, local contests, and daily-entry promotions
sites.draw: New third-party sweepstakes added daily; frequency varies by sponsor
sites.unsub: Newsletter unsubscribe link and account notification preferences
sites.redFlags: Large listing volume requires users to review each outside sponsor's rules and privacy terms
sites.affiliate_note: Potential directory advertising and featured-placement partner

sites.name: Contest Girl
sites.prizes: More than 1,500 listed U.S. and Canadian sweepstakes spanning cash, travel, merchandise, and instant wins
sites.draw: Listings updated daily; filters include entry frequency, value, location, and expiration
sites.unsub: Newsletter unsubscribe; account controls for saved contests
sites.redFlags: Older interface and community-submitted comments; eligibility differs between U.S. and Canadian listings
sites.affiliate_note: Potential newsletter or directory sponsorship

sites.name: Sweepstake.com
sites.prizes: Hundreds of cash, travel, gift-card, merchandise, and instant-win promotions from outside sponsors
sites.draw: Human-reviewed listings added frequently; each promotion has its own schedule
sites.redFlags: Directory links lead to third parties with different data collection and marketing practices
sites.affiliate_note: Potential directory advertising and sponsorship

sites.name: Online-Sweepstakes.com
sites.prizes: Daily listings for cash, cars, travel, electronics, gift cards, and brand giveaways
sites.draw: New listings and expired-link cleanup advertised daily
sites.unsub: Newsletter unsubscribe and community account settings
sites.redFlags: Users still leave the site to enter; sponsor quality, tracking, and opt-ins vary by listing
sites.affiliate_note: Potential featured listing, newsletter, or sponsorship partner

sites.name: SweepsToday
sites.prizes: Curated free sweepstakes, giveaways, and contests linking to official sponsor pages
sites.draw: Active listings reviewed and refreshed regularly
sites.redFlags: A directory cannot control the privacy or fulfillment practices of every outside sponsor
sites.affiliate_note: Potential directory sponsorship

sites.name: I Love Giveaways
sites.prizes: Daily sweepstakes, giveaways, instant-win games, cash, travel, and merchandise
sites.draw: Hundreds of active listings with new promotions added daily
sites.redFlags: Broad directory volume means users must verify rules, eligibility, and sponsor consent language
sites.affiliate_note: Potential directory sponsorship and featured placement

sites.name: SweepFeed
sites.prizes: Aggregated high-value sweepstakes with category, expiration, and legitimacy signals
sites.draw: Automated discovery across dozens of sources with frequent updates
sites.redFlags: Newer service; automated scoring and listing claims still require checking the official rules
sites.affiliate_note: Potential software, newsletter, or featured-placement partner

sites.name: eSweeps
sites.prizes: Cash, vacations, instant wins, freebies, and daily-entry promotions
sites.draw: Directory updated with ongoing third-party promotions
sites.redFlags: Promotes entry-helper software; users should avoid automation that violates individual sweepstakes rules
sites.affiliate_note: Potential directory or software partnership

sites.name: WinPrizesOnline
sites.prizes: Cash, cars, vacations, gift cards, instant wins, and daily-entry sweepstakes
sites.draw: New directory listings added throughout the year
sites.redFlags: Newer directory with limited independent track record; every sponsor's official rules should be checked
sites.affiliate_note: Potential directory sponsorship or featured placement

sites.name: Robin Giveaways
sites.prizes: Discovery and tracking for daily-entry sweepstakes from outside sponsors
sites.draw: Continuously updated app-based feed; schedules vary by promotion
sites.redFlags: App requires an account and adds another data layer between entrants and outside sponsors
sites.affiliate_note: Potential app referral or sponsorship partner

sites.name: The Luck Foundry
sites.prizes: Sweepstakes aggregation, entry tracking, reminders, daily routines, and prize-value sorting
sites.draw: Listings refresh regularly; individual drawing schedules vary
sites.redFlags: Premium features may cost money; paid convenience does not improve the underlying odds
sites.affiliate_note: Potential premium-service affiliate or sponsorship partner

sites.name: Sweetie Sweepstakes
sites.prizes: Public sweepstakes listings plus local, quick-ending, and member-only listings through a paid companion service
sites.draw: Public listings updated regularly; premium local and early-access listings vary
sites.unsub: Email unsubscribe; paid Secret Sweeps membership managed through account/support
sites.redFlags: Optional private membership costs about $50 per year; paying for access does not guarantee wins
sites.affiliate_note: Potential membership referral or sponsorship partner

sites.name: LocalFreebie
sites.prizes: State-targeted sweepstakes, free samples, consumer rewards, and local offers
sites.draw: Listings organized by state and advertised as checked daily
sites.redFlags: Newer directory with limited independent history; local availability and sponsor terms vary
sites.affiliate_note: Potential local featured-placement and lead-generation partner

sites.name: I Love Free Things (ILFT)
sites.prizes: Free samples, coupons, product-testing opportunities, giveaways, and limited-time brand offers
sites.draw: Fresh offers posted daily; many are first-come samples rather than drawings
sites.redFlags: Offer availability disappears quickly; outside brand forms may collect marketing data
sites.affiliate_note: Potential freebie-directory sponsorship or featured offer placement
